# Agent guide

Conventions for AI coding agents working in this repo.

## Canonical commands
- Install: `make install`
- Test:    `make test`
- Lint:    `make lint`

## CI and the feedback loop

**CI is part of the feedback loop.** After you push or update a PR, **monitor GitHub Actions / workflow runs and check results**. When **CI fails**, read the logs, **fix the root cause**, and push follow-up commits. Do not stop while checks are red or ignore failing workflows.

## Do not touch
- `vendor/` — third-party code, regenerated by `make vendor`.
- `migrations/` — schema migrations are append-only; never edit existing files.

## Branch + commit conventions
- Feature branches: `feat/<short-description>`
- Conventional Commits style for messages.
